title: Bitcoin Covenants
description: Covenants constrain how coins can be spent in future transactions. They enable advanced contract constructions such as vaults, payment pools, and congestion-control trees.

resources.title: Covenants.info Use Case: Transaction Templating
resources.notes: Concrete covenant-style use case showing template-constrained spending trees.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Comprehensive reference for Script, transactions, and advanced protocol design.
